summary: VERIFIED: CRE payment collections now appear in Accountant Approvals tab. Bug fix confirmed - income records created with status='pending_approval' and source='approval'. End-to-end flow tested: CRE collect payment → Accountant sees pending income → Approve/Reject actions work correctly.
seed_data_creation: Created test payments on stages ps_0a70cc058860, ps_c0fc6370c88e, ps_73ab998eab65 in project proj_8ce119c8db61
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified. Key code changes in /app/backend/routes/projects.py line 1921 (status='pending_approval') and /app/backend/routes/crm.py line 773-774 (deal closing income record). All 8 features verified working.

features_tested.1_cre_collect_payment: PASS - POST /api/payment-stages/{stage_id}/collect creates income with status='pending_approval' and source='approval'
features_tested.2_accountant_sees_pending: PASS - GET /api/approvals/unified returns pending income with correct structure

features_tested.7_presales_sales_transfer: PASS - Pre-Sales to Sales transfer functionality intact
features_tested.8_stage_management: PASS - Stage Management page accessible with correct data
